holdings.infoBox: SCHY is an equity ETF with a total of 134 individual holdings. The top holdings are Eni S.p.A. stock at 4.58%, TotalEnergies SE at 4.50%, Wesfarmers at 4.48%, BHP Group at 4.46%, and Allianz SE at 4.24%.

overview.description: The Schwab International Dividend Equity ETF (SCHY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high dividend yield equity. The fund tracks a modified market-cap-weighted index of 100 high-dividend-yielding stocks located outside of the US. Stocks are selected based on additional fundamental criteria and low volatility. SCHY was launched on Apr 29, 2021 and is issued by Charles Schwab.
